description: Alonso attacker, no defending hero (replaces Alonso_tc daut_viper_2). WIP attacks with Alonso (1000 inf / 500 lanc / 500 mark t6), minxxx defends with no heroes. Chance-based skills — collect 8 game results. NOTE: Alonso must be available on WIP — capture fresh skills before running. Reference: WOS-191.
